name: harm-risk:controlled
description: Lifecycle: controls implemented, residual risk acceptable

name: harm-risk:residual-accepted
description: Lifecycle: residual risk accepted via documented benefit-risk analysis

name: hazard-cat:clinical-misinterpretation
description: Hazard: presentation invites wrong clinical conclusion

name: hazard-cat:usability
description: Hazard: use error caused by the interface (IEC 62366-1)

name: use-scenario
description: Hazard-related use scenario, IEC 62366-1 (see docs/USABILITY.md) — feeds the harm-risk register

name: soup-anomaly
description: Known anomaly affecting a SOUP component (see docs/SOUP.md)

name: disclose-in-ifu
description: Information-for-safety control to surface in the accompanying information/IFU (ISO 14971 §8)

name: field-feedback
description: Production/post-production information intake (ISO 14971 §10) — triage into the registers

name: pms-review
description: Post-market surveillance / ISO 14971 §10 periodic review (see docs/PMS.md)
